description_long: This airplane features a dark, metallic fuselage with a sleek, aggressive profile and angular, swept-back wings. The wings are reinforced with visible struts and have mechanical, almost skeletal extensions at their tips, giving the craft a menacing, futuristic appearance. Twin large engines with orange heat-dissipation fins are mounted on the upper rear of the fuselage, suggesting high thrust capability. The cockpit is positioned at the front, enclosed with a tinted canopy, and the nose is elongated and pointed, enhancing aerodynamic efficiency. The undercarriage appears to have articulated landing gear, partially exposed and integrated into the wing structure. The overall design is reminiscent of a science fiction or military stealth aircraft, with a focus on speed, maneuverability, and advanced technology.
description: A dark, metallic, futuristic airplane with swept-back wings, twin rear engines, and a pointed nose. The design is aggressive and high-tech, featuring visible struts and an enclosed forward cockpit.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, forward cockpit, and wide, angular wings with skeletal extensions.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated fuselage, twin engines with orange fins, and the articulated landing gear integrated into the wing.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the twin engine exhausts, swept-back wings, and the overall width of the airplane.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the engine placement, wing structure, and mechanical details along the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with swept-back wings and pronounced skeletal extensions; no visible winglets; slight anhedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted on the upper rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers integrated into the rear fuselage.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear with two main units and a nose gear, partially exposed.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed cockpit with a single-seat canopy integrated into the nose section.
